rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §32.155 governs student data security practices for educational operators. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 32.155. PROTECTION OF COVERED INFORMATION. (a) An operator must implement and maintain reasonable security procedures and practices designed to protect any covered information from unauthorized access, deletion, use, modification, or disclosure.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and student data security statute; no conflict identified.
